news.t: Big Tech's AI Bets Pay Off: How to Play Latest Earnings

holdings.infoBox: MSFD is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 66.57%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 23.90%, Microsoft Inc Swap at 5.59%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 5.15%, and Microsoft Inc Swap at 2.38%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily MSFT Bear 1X ETF (MSFD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Microsoft stock. MSFD was launched on Sep 7, 2022 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Big Tech's AI Bets Pay Off: How to Play Latest Earnings
data.text: Four of the Magnificent Seven reported earnings yesterday—Meta, Microsoft, Amazon, and Alphabet—beating most Wall Street expectations. As seasoned traders know, however, the prevailing market reaction...

data.title: Direxion's Dave Mazza delivers insights behind single-stock ETFs
data.text: Dave Mazza, Direxion head of product, joins the 'Halftime Report' to discuss single-stock ETFs, who is investing in the product and what they're doing with them.
